title: Tracker-neutral acceptance plan
description: A tracker-agnostic plan of up-front end-to-end / acceptance tickets derived from the PRODUCT spec's acceptance criteria — the outer TDD loop for the whole feature, writable before any code exists. Produced by the acceptance-spec-architect agent; consumed by an execution agent and tracker publishers. Holds INTENT only — no tracker-specific fields. Sibling to build-plan.schema.json (what to build, test-first) and ticket-plan.schema.json (what to test); this one is what JOURNEYS must pass.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking changes.

spec.description: Filename of the companion human-readable acceptance spec (e.g. ACCEPTANCE_SPEC.md).

milestone.description: Single top-level grouping. Adapters map to a Linear Project/Milestone, Jira Epic, or GitHub Milestone.

key.description: Stable, unique, kebab-case identifier. Used for idempotent re-publish.

tickets.description: Flat list of E2E/harness tickets. Ordering via parent + blockedBy by key (journeys blocked by their harness).

ticketKey.description: Stable, unique, kebab-case ticket identity. Referenced by parent/blockedBy and STAMPED onto the created issue for idempotent re-publish.

prId.description: A product-requirement ID from the product spec (the traceability spine).

title.description: Concise human title. Prefix with the layer, e.g. 'E2E: guest checkout happy path'.

layer.description: e2e = a user-observable journey against a built app + mocked backend (MUST carry cases + tracesTo). harness = the mocked-backend rig / seed fixtures the journeys depend on.

stack.description: Stack/area key for polyglot repos (e.g. 'js-frontend'). Omit or use '-' for single-stack.

priority.description: Neutral priority. Adapters map to the tracker's scale via per-team config.

labels.description: Free-form neutral labels. Adapters may prefix/translate them.

description.description: Markdown body: the journey and why it matters. Adapters render this plus the other fields into the issue body.

cases.description: The journeys as Given/When/Then, lifted from the product spec's acceptance criteria — user-observable, never referencing internal modules. Required for e2e tickets.

tracesTo.description: PR-* product-requirement IDs this journey exercises (the traceability spine). Required for e2e tickets; the validator checks each exists in the product spec.

modulesInScope.description: REAL, verified paths: the E2E spec file (correct E2E naming infix), the mocked-backend harness, and seed fixtures. Never placeholders.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Checkable Definition of Done as a checklist — not a restatement of the cases. Runs in the separate E2E CI job; artifacts on failure; asserts only user-observable outcomes.

parent.description: Optional key of a parent ticket. A RELATIONSHIP, not nesting. Must reference another ticket's key.

blockedBy.description: Keys of tickets that must be done first (e.g. the harness ticket a journey depends on). Must reference another ticket's key.

allOf.description: E2E tickets must enumerate journeys (cases) and trace to at least one requirement.
